title: Refrigeration Technology
description: Refrigeration technology allows preservation of perishables for longer periods. This is a significant upgrade that opens new trade possibilities for food and other perishable goods across longer routes.
definition-of-done: Refrigeration upgrade available for purchase. Upgrade extends perishable decay time. Works on caravans and storage. Cost/benefit visible in upgrade UI.
testing-plan: Verify refrigeration purchase works. Test decay extension effect. Verify works on both caravans and storage. Test cost/benefit display.
todos: Create decay modifier for refrigerated goods
